stemHtml: What action is required by the pilot of an aircraft if unable to establish radio contact with an aeronautical station?

options.a: The aircraft shall squawk Code 7500 and land at the nearest suitable aerodrome.
options.b: The aircraft shall attempt to establish communication with other aircraft or other aeronautical stations on frequencies appropriate to the route.
options.c: The aircraft shall squawk Code 7600 and proceed to its original destination in accordance with its filed flight plan.
options.d: The pilot shall ensure that the radio equipment is functioning correctly and then make a test transmission on the appropriate frequency for the route being flown.
